=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
TD Waterhouse Centre 
Orlando, Florida
2002.01.31

No info about lineage and taper. Drop between CD1 and Cd2.
Great sound

CD1
1 intro
2 Wait For The Light To Shine (acoustic) (Larry on mandolin) (song by Fred Rose) 
3 Girl Of The North Country (acoustic) (Bob on harp) 
4 It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding) (acoustic) (Larry on bouzouki) 
5 Searching For A Soldier's Grave (acoustic) (Larry on mandolin and Bob on harp)
6 Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum 
7 Just Like A Woman (Bob on harp and Larry on pedal steel) 
8 Lonesome Day Blues 
9 High Water (For Charlie Patton) (Larry on banjo) 
10 Don't Think Twice, It's All Right (acoustic) (Bob on harp) 
11 John Brown (acoustic) (Larry on bouzouki) 
12 Tangled Up In Blue (acoustic) (Bob on harp) 

CD2
1 Summer Days (Tony on standup bass) 
2 Sugar Baby (Tony on standup bass) 
3 Drifter's Escape (Bob on harp) 
4 Rainy Day Women #12 & 35 (Larry on steel guitar) 
5 Love Sick 
6 Like A Rolling Stone 
7 Forever Young (acoustic) (Bob on harp) 
8 Honest With Me 
9 Blowin' In The Wind (acoustic) (Bob on harp) 


Concert # 1384 of The Never-Ending Tour. First concert of the 2002 US Winter Tour. First 2002 concert.

 

First concert with the 13th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), Charlie Sexton (guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), George Recile (drums & percussion).

 

1–4, 9–11, 18, 20 acoustic with the band.

 

2, 3, 6, 9, 11, 14, 18, 20 Bob Dylan (harmonica).

 

3, 10 Larry Campbell (bouzouki).

 

1, 4, 18, 20 Larry Campbell & Charlie Sexton (backup vocals).

 

Note. Only 4 new songs (50%) compared to previous concert
